colors.contrast_rules: CRITICAL: White text on Saffron (#FF6B00) fails WCAG AA contrast. You MUST use Deep Navy (#1A237E) or Black text/icons on Saffron backgrounds. Saffron text can be used on Navy or White backgrounds.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: High-Contrast, Single-Column Mobile-First. Everything must be highly legible on 320px screens. Generous internal padding.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Cardless layout or solid borders. Use solid 2px borders (border-[#1A237E]/20) with p-6 or p-8 padding to separate sections visually. Avoid subtle box-shadows as they fail on low-end screens.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: grid-cols-1 default for mobile. Use grid-cols-2 only for large tap target grids (like language selection).

voice_interface.classes: w-[80px] h-[80px] rounded-full bg-[#FF6B00] text-[#1A237E] flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_8px_16px_rgba(255,107,0,0.3)]
voice_interface.animation: Pulsing waveform effect (scale 1 to 1.1) when active using Framer Motion.

panic_button.classes: bg-[#D32F2F] text-white font-black text-xl px-6 py-4 rounded-xl shadow-lg border-2 border-[#D32F2F] uppercase tracking-wider

rights_meter.classes: h-6 w-full bg-[#E8EAF6] rounded-full overflow-hidden border-2 border-[#1A237E]/10

jargon_buster.classes: underline decoration-[#FF6B00] decoration-[3px] underline-offset-4 cursor-pointer font-bold text-[#1A237E] hover:bg-[#FF6B00]/10

timeline_visualizer.classes: flex items-center space-x-4 overflow-x-auto pb-4 snap-x

icons_and_assets.sizing: w-8 h-8 minimum for standard icons, w-10 h-10 or w-12 h-12 for primary pictograms
icons_and_assets.stroke_weight: 3px (Bold and highly visible for low literacy)

hero_community.description: Indian community gathering. Use in the 'Community Q&A', 'NGO Finder' header, or landing screen to establish trust.

citizen_support.description: Rural citizen. Use for the user persona / profile placeholder or 'Know Your Rights' educational sections.

accessibility_and_motion.motion: Minimal and purposeful. The only continuous motion should be the active voice waveform.
accessibility_and_motion.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='voice-record-btn').
accessibility_and_motion.contrast: Ensure pure black or deep navy text over saffron elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the 18px minimum body size (text-lg) and 22px minimum heading size (text-2xl) across the app.
Implement the voice recording button as a massive 80x80px element with pulsing animation to indicate listening.
Ensure 'Saffron' buttons have 'Deep Navy' text. DO NOT use white text on Saffron, it fails accessibility contrast.
Keep standard padding large: use p-6 or p-8 inside cards/sections to prevent mis-taps on small screens.
Do not use subtle gray text. The lightest text allowed is text-[#1A237E]/80.
Use Lucide icons, but scale them up (w-8 h-8 minimum) with a thick 3px stroke to serve as clear pictograms for low-literacy users.
Build the Jargon Buster using a Popover or Dialog component triggered by tapping thickly underlined words.
Avoid decorative CSS backgrounds that increase page weight. Stick to solid colors (White, Saffron, Deep Navy) for 2G network optimization.
